diff: The documents herein list the off-chain operational parameters for the Pattern Liquidity Layer. These operational parameters are protocol settings managed outside of smart contracts (off-chain), used by operators and off-chain systems to guide the functioning of the Pattern Liquidity Layer.
summary: Transfer Integrator Program Responsibility To Operational GovOps
description: Transfers responsibility for the Integrator Program from Ecosystem Actor Viridian Advisors to Operational GovOps.
